text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 65 

PTB_DRUG_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Part B Drug Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for Part B drugs for a given year. The 
total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + 
LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

Part B drug claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and
